teleportcakes.name: Teleport Cakes
tooltip.teleportcakes.end_cake: §7When eaten it will transport you to the end, an Overworld Cake will then be generated at the end.
tooltip.teleportcakes.nether_cake: §7When eaten it will transport you to the nether, an Overworld Cake will then be generated at the nether.
msg.teleportcakes.cannot_eat_end_cake: You can't eat End Cake at the end
msg.teleportcakes.cannot_eat_overworld_c: You can't eat Overworld Cake at the overworld
msg.teleportcakes.cannot_eat_nether_cake: You can't eat Nether Cake at the nether
msg.teleportcakes.creating_nether_spwan_: First teleport: finding and generating the Nether platform, please wait
config.teleportcakes.title: Teleport Cakes settings
config.teleportcakes.enable_eating_cakes: Enable sound when eating cakes from this mod.
Enable sound when eating cakes from this mod.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.teleportc: Adds cakes for teleportation between various dimensions.
